title: il_calculator
description: Impermanent loss calculator for standard constant-product AMM and Uniswap V3 concentrated liquidity positions.

entry_price_ratio.description: Price ratio of token A to token B at entry

current_price_ratio.description: Current price ratio of token A to token B

range_lower.description: Lower price bound (required for concentrated positions)

range_upper.description: Upper price bound (required for concentrated positions)

position_value_usd.description: Current value of LP position in USD

hold_value_usd.description: Value if tokens were simply held (no LP)

in_range.description: Whether current price is within the concentrated range (null for standard)
